decisions.title: Canonical bus taxonomy in machine-readable registry
decisions.description: Adopt a single YAML registry at docs/contracts/subject-registry.yaml as source of truth for event-bus subjects, with canonical format {event}.v{version}.{venue}.{instrument} and explicit status values stable/draft/planned.
alternatives: Keep taxonomy only in prose across docs/contracts/event-bus.md and feature-packs
Use JSON schema-first framework before stabilizing names

decisions.title: Storage bounded context is consumer-only for domain subjects
decisions.description: Storage feature-pack was corrected to not emit insights or aggregation subjects. Storage consumes and persists; domain subject emission remains with aggregation/insights/marketdata producers.
alternatives: Allow storage to emit insights.crossvenue.* runtime subjects
Keep ambiguous output declarations in storage pack

decisions.title: Resolve TBD subjects with explicit planned names
decisions.description: Replaced placeholder/TBD subjects in heatmap, volume-profiles, and liquidations-markprice packs with explicit planned subjects to enable future CI validation and avoid naming drift.

decisions.title: Instrument vs symbol divergence handling
decisions.description: Registry enforces instrument token for event-bus subjects while WS docs keep symbol as delivery representation, with explicit naming note to prevent cross-layer confusion.
alternatives: Force instrument token in WS path contracts
